findings.summary: Opening header Search leaves document.activeElement on BODY until Tab; Search catalog input is reachable and typeable by keyboard, but focus is not moved into the field on activate. Console reports HeaderSearch/InputGroupInput missing React.forwardRef (ref warning logged as error).
